subject: A dark cavernous interior with billowing fabric or smoke and a central standing stone structure lit by warm light below
description: A dark underground or enclosed space dominates the composition. Large draped fabric forms or billowing cloth-like shapes hang and curve across the upper portion, rendered in near-black and amber tones. Near the center, a vertical stone pillar or standing structure is lit from below by a warm amber glow, suggesting firelight or lantern light at ground level. The lower portion of the scene reveals a narrow passage or floor space lit dimly from below. The overall atmosphere is oppressive and subterranean, with a single point of warm light providing the only visual anchor in an otherwise dark space.
foreground: Dark draped fabric-like forms and shadowed cave ceiling
background: Narrow illuminated cave passage with warm light below
